billing_information.cancellation_policy: Cancel anytime with 30 days notice; no long-term contracts required

annual_discount.description: Pay annually and receive a 15% discount on all tiers and add-on variants

free_trial.description: PARWA does not offer a free trial, but we provide a free live demo session where you can interact with our AI agents in real time and see how they handle your specific use cases

overage_pricing.description: If you exceed your monthly ticket limit, additional tickets are billed at a per-ticket rate depending on your tier

billing_information.enterprise_billing: Custom invoicing and procurement support available for High tier and Enterprise customers

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.target_audience: Small businesses and startups looking to automate basic customer support with AI
tiers.description: Get started with AI-powered customer support. Perfect for teams ready to reduce response times and handle common inquiries automatically.

channels.name: Email
channels.description: Automated email responses for customer inquiries

knowledge_base.description: Upload up to 50 knowledge base articles; simple keyword-based search for agent responses

ideal_for: Small e-commerce stores with 100-500 daily customer emails
SaaS companies wanting to deflect Tier 1 support tickets
Businesses spending 10+ hours/week on repetitive FAQs

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.target_audience: Growing businesses that need multi-channel support and advanced AI capabilities
tiers.description: Scale your support operations with multi-channel AI, advanced knowledge management, and priority support. Ideal for businesses handling high customer interaction volumes.

channels.name: Email
channels.description: Automated email responses for customer inquiries

channels.name: Live Chat
channels.description: Real-time AI chat support on your website or app with human handoff capability

knowledge_base.description: Upload up to 500 knowledge base articles; AI-powered semantic search with automatic learning from resolved tickets and agent corrections

tiers.support_level: Priority support (Mon-Sat, 8AM-10PM EST) with 4-hour response time SLA

integrations.custom_description: Up to 3 custom integrations included; additional integrations available for a setup fee

features: Ticket volume tracking with trend analysis
Response time metrics with percentile breakdowns
Resolution rate overview with category drill-down
Advanced knowledge base (up to 500 articles) with auto-learning
Enhanced response quality with sentiment analysis
Human agent handoff with context transfer
ideal_for: Mid-size e-commerce brands processing 500+ orders daily
Businesses currently spending 30+ hours/week on customer support

tiers.name: High
tiers.target_audience: Enterprise-level businesses requiring full omnichannel support, maximum AI power, and dedicated resources
tiers.description: The ultimate AI support solution. Unlimited agents, all channels, voice support, custom AI training, and a dedicated account manager to ensure your success.

channels.name: Email
channels.description: Automated email responses for customer inquiries

channels.name: Live Chat
channels.description: Real-time AI chat support on your website or app with human handoff capability

channels.name: Phone
channels.description: AI-powered voice support for inbound customer calls with IVR routing and call transcription

channels.name: SMS
channels.description: Automated SMS responses via Twilio with TCPA compliance

knowledge_base.description: Unlimited knowledge base articles; AI-powered semantic search with continuous auto-learning from resolved tickets, agent corrections, and feedback loops

tiers.support_level: 24/7 priority support with 1-hour response time SLA and dedicated account manager

integrations.custom_description: Unlimited custom integrations with full engineering support from PARWA team

voice_support.description: AI-powered voice agent for inbound calls with natural language understanding, IVR replacement, call routing, voicemail transcription, and multi-language voice support

dedicated_account_manager.description: A named account manager who conducts weekly check-ins, quarterly business reviews, and proactively optimizes your AI agent configuration

custom_ai_training.description: PARWA data scientists work with your team to fine-tune AI models on your specific domain terminology, product catalog, brand voice, and historical support data

features: All channels: Email, Live Chat, Phone, SMS, Slack
Advanced knowledge base (unlimited articles) with continuous auto-learning
Premium response quality with advanced sentiment and tone adaptation
Unlimited custom integrations with engineering support
Advanced analytics with predictive insights and custom reporting
AI-powered voice support for phone calls
Human agent handoff with full context transfer
Dedicated account manager with weekly check-ins
Custom AI model training on your domain data
ideal_for: Large e-commerce enterprises with 5,000+ daily orders
Companies spending $50,000+/month on customer support operations

variant_pricing.description: AI agent variants are add-on specialized agents beyond your tier's included agent count. Each variant is purpose-built for a specific support function within your industry.
variant_pricing.note: Variant prices are per-unit per-month. Tickets listed are the monthly capacity each variant can handle. If you exceed variant ticket capacity, overage rates from your tier apply.

e-commerce.description: Specialized variants for online retail operations including order management, returns, product inquiries, shipping, and payment support

variants.name: Order Management
variants.description: Handles order placement, modification, cancellation, status tracking, and order-related inquiries end-to-end

variants.name: Returns & Refunds
variants.description: Manages return requests, refund processing, exchange offers, return shipping labels, and refund timeline inquiries

variants.name: Product FAQ
variants.description: Answers product-specific questions including specifications, availability, compatibility, sizing, materials, and warranty information

variants.name: Shipping Inquiries
variants.description: Provides shipping cost estimates, delivery timelines, carrier information, tracking details, and shipping policy clarifications

variants.name: Payment Issues
variants.description: Resolves payment failures, declined transactions, duplicate charges, refund discrepancies, and payment method updates

saas.description: Specialized variants for software-as-a-service companies covering technical support, billing, feature guidance, API help, and account management

variants.name: Technical Support
variants.description: Troubleshoots software bugs, configuration issues, error messages, performance problems, and provides step-by-step resolution guides

variants.name: Billing Support
variants.description: Handles subscription management, invoice inquiries, plan upgrades/downgrades, payment failures, and proration calculations

variants.name: Feature Requests
variants.description: Collects, categorizes, and manages feature requests, provides product roadmap information, and communicates known feature statuses

variants.name: API Support
variants.description: Assists with API integration, authentication, rate limiting, webhook configuration, error code troubleshooting, and endpoint documentation

variants.name: Account Issues
variants.description: Manages account setup, password resets, two-factor authentication, team member access, role permissions, and account data exports

logistics.description: Specialized variants for logistics and supply chain operations covering shipment tracking, delivery issues, warehouse operations, fleet management, and compliance

variants.name: Shipment Tracking
variants.description: Provides real-time shipment tracking, estimated delivery updates, tracking number lookups, multi-carrier status aggregation, and delivery confirmation

variants.name: Delivery Issues
variants.description: Handles delayed deliveries, damaged goods claims, wrong address corrections, missed delivery rescheduling, and proof of delivery disputes

variants.name: Warehouse Queries
variants.description: Manages inventory availability inquiries, warehouse location lookups, stock transfer requests, storage fee questions, and warehouse hours

variants.name: Fleet Management
variants.description: Tracks vehicle assignments, driver schedules, fuel usage reports, vehicle maintenance alerts, and route optimization inquiries

variants.name: Customs & Compliance
variants.description: Provides customs documentation guidance, import/export regulation information, tariff classification, HS code lookups, and compliance requirement checks

sales_talking_points.roi_pitch: PARWA typically delivers ROI within 60 days. Customers report a 70% reduction in support costs, 50% faster resolution times, and 95%+ customer satisfaction rates.
sales_talking_points.starter_pitch: At just $999/month, PARWA Starter handles 1,000 tickets automatically. That is less than $1 per resolved ticket. Compare that to the $6-12 industry average for human-agent resolution.
sales_talking_points.growth_pitch: Growth at $2,499/month gives you multi-channel support and auto-learning AI. Our customers typically save $15,000-25,000/month by deflecting tickets that would otherwise require 5-8 full-time agents.
sales_talking_points.high_pitch: Our High tier at $3,999/month is for serious scale. With unlimited agents and voice support, you get the equivalent of a 30+ agent team for under $4,000. That is a 90% cost reduction compared to traditional support operations.
sales_talking_points.upgrade_path: Most customers start with Starter and upgrade to Growth within 3 months as they see immediate results. Upgrades are seamless with no data migration or configuration changes needed.
sales_talking_points.annual_savings: Switching to annual billing saves 15% — that is $1,800/year on Growth and $6,000/year on High tier.
